title: LevelledMobs
description: Level-up mobs on your server, RPG-style! Perfect for Survival, Skyblock, and more.
body:
| | | | --- | --- | | Java Version Required: | Java 21 (or newer) | | Compatible Minecraft Versions: | 1.21, 26.1+ | | Documentation (Wiki): | [Click to View Wiki](https://arcaneplugins.gitbook.io/levelledmobs-the-ultimate-mob-levelling-solution) | | Discord Server (Chat/Support): | [Click to Join Discord](https://discord.com/invite/HqZwdcJ) | | Source Code: | [Click to View Repository](https://github.com/lokka30/LevelledMobs/) | | Credits: | [Click to View Credits](https://arcaneplugins.gitbook.io/levelledmobs-the-ultimate-mob-levelling-solution/credits-and-misc/developers-and-contributors) | ![LevelledMobs Banner](https://i.ibb.co/pwpqK6c/LM4.png)

Welcome to LevelledMobs 4

The Ultimate RPG Mob Levelling Solution

by PenalBuffalo, UltimaOath and lokka30

## Want to add a new challenge to your server, without changing the vanilla feel? Combine any number of unique Levelling Strategies and Modifiers to upgrade mobs! - Distance-from-Origin based; - Y-Coordinate; - Random and Weighted Random; - Player Variable (PAPI Supported) - and much more! ## Configurable and Compatable The entire system is 85% run from the single `rules.yml` file. The rest works from the other four files. Since we utilize almost entirely vanilla features and mechanics, it provides a huge degree of control and compatability. We even provide the `externalplugins.yml` which gives you the means to identify any 3rd party plugin using the most commonly used methods. ## Detailed Wiki, Dedicated Support Much time and effort has gone into documenting how to use the plugin for the beginner to the more advanced users. We have also provided a well documented and highly active support Discord channel for multiple years. ## Works Out-of-the-Box Our default configuration is designed to work for most server configurations and most situations out-of-the-box, meaning all you have to do is install the plugin and let it work. The default settings have been play tested and tweaked by the developers over several years and have been proven reliable and ready for most server environments. The plugin itself functions on Spigot and PaperMC, though it is written primarily with PaperMC in mind. ## Custom Drops and 3rd Party Item Support We provide an easy to understand and highly customizable Custom Drops system which can be applied in a number of various ways (the most flexible would be as a Drop Table, implemented via a Custom Rule). We also provide support for multiple 3rd party item-generator plugins through our official addon LM_Items. # Can your server handle the ultimate mob levelling solution?

Integrations

  • Known supported 3rd party mob generators
  • Known 3rd party plugins which support us
  • Official ArcanePlugins - LM_Items
